summary: Design systems are essential for creating beautiful, professional, and consistent websites.
key_takeaways: Standardize typography, sizing, color, and graphics to create a cohesive design language.
Use a limited number of fonts (2-3) to simplify the design process.
Choose colors based on fundamental principles: use a limited number of colors, different shades and tints of the same color, light-dark contrast, and complementary colors.
Use a design library in Figma to keep design elements, colors, and typography organized and consistent.
